home.metaDescription: Multi-vendor electrical components for industrial plants in Singapore, Malaysia, and Indonesia — backed by engineering expertise and on-site services.
home.heroSub: From specification to delivery, we provide multi-vendor electrical components for industrial plants in Singapore, Malaysia, and Indonesia — backed by engineering expertise and on-site services to ensure the right fit and reliable operation.
home.industriesSub: From Oil & Gas to Data Centers, Bao Service delivers proven electrical engineering and product supply solutions, backed by decades of industrial expertise.
home.productsSub: We source and supply electrical equipment from trusted manufacturers, ensuring quality, compliance, and reliability across all our deliverables.
home.deliverSub: Clear method, professional documentation, and responsive support—so your plant gets the right electrical equipment and reliable outcomes.
home.faqSub: Clear answers about our electrical products, engineering support, and regional coverage
home.contactTitle: Get Expert Support for Your Electrical Needs
home.contactSub: Our engineers respond within 24 hours to provide tailored solutions and product recommendations

energy.metaTitle: Energy Cost Reduction & TNB Analysis | Bao Service Malaysia
energy.metaDescription: Data-driven energy cost reduction for industrial and commercial facilities in Malaysia. Free TNB bill analysis, full meter data review, and right-sized cost reduction measures.
energy.heroTitle: Reduce energy cost with your actual data
energy.heroSub: A data-driven approach using your real TNB bills and meter data to pinpoint cost reduction—right-sized measures that lower spend without oversizing equipment.
energy.heroAudience: Industrial and commercial facilities in Malaysia
energy.tariffEligibilityBody: Our free TNB analysis and cost-reduction programme is built for commercial and industrial accounts on Malaysia’s medium-voltage time-of-use tariff—not domestic or low-voltage rates.
energy.tariffCategoryName: Tariff category: Bukan Domestik ToU Voltan Sederhana
energy.tariffEligibilityImageAlt: Kuala Lumpur skyline with Petronas Twin Towers, Malaysia
energy.evidenceTitle: Bills and reports we work from
energy.evidenceSub: You share TNB bills; we return structured analysis you can act on.
energy.evidenceTnbSub: Tariff class, kW demand, peak/off-peak kWh, and charges.
energy.evidenceReportSub: Summary findings, trends, and recommended next steps.
energy.processSub: From your TNB bills to measurable savings—three structured stages, no guesswork.
energy.processStep1Desc: We review your TNB bills under Bukan Domestik ToU Voltan Sederhana—tariff, demand, and trends—and share a free report with initial findings.
energy.processStep2Desc: We study main and sub-meter parameters to build an accurate load profile from your facility, not assumptions.
energy.processStep3Desc: We propose and implement measures matched to your profile to lower cost, maximize savings, and avoid oversized equipment.
energy.freeReportSub: Share your recent TNB bills and facility context—we will return a professional summary with no obligation.
energy.freeReportBullet4: Recommendation on full data analysis if warranted
energy.tnbMailSubject: Request: Free TNB Bill Analysis (Bukan Domestik ToU Voltan Sederhana)
energy.tnbMailBody:
Dear Bao Service,

I would like to request a free TNB bill analysis for our facility.

TNB tariff category: Bukan Domestik ToU Voltan Sederhana

--- Please complete the details below ---

Company / facility name:

Contact person:

Job title / designation:

Mobile number:

Email address:

Facility location (state / city):

TNB account no. (if available):

Brief note (optional):


I can attach recent TNB bills in a follow-up email if needed.

Thank you.
energy.demoIntro: Example of ongoing monitoring after we implement cost reduction measures.
energy.peakChartPeriod: Peak period: weekdays 14:00 – 22:00 (Mon–Fri). All other hours are off-peak.
energy.peakStatusPeak: Weekday peak period (2:00 PM–10:00 PM) — consider reducing non-essential loads.
energy.peakStatusOffPeak: Weekday off-peak — outside 2:00 PM–10:00 PM on Mon–Fri.
energy.peakStatusWeekend: Weekend — all hours are off-peak. Peak applies Mon–Fri, 2:00 PM–10:00 PM only.
energy.energyMixFooter: Proportions refresh automatically from simulated meter data.
energy.tnbReportModalHint: I would like a free TNB bill analysis report for my facility. Attached are my recent TNB bills / details:

pm.metaDescription: Your team's trusted backup when it matters most. Project management support across Southeast Asia.
pm.heroSub: Your Team's Trusted Backup When It Matters Most
pm.heroBody: Projects don't always go as planned — key members get overloaded, schedules clash, and decisions need a second voice. That's where we come in.
